<?php

include('userinfo.php');
$PROJECT_TYPE = PROJECT_TYPE;

if($_GET['BudgetIncrementV2_dt']){

	//================================================utk unitPurchasing punya case, gedik
    $unitBayaran = executeQueryV2([
        "sql" => "SELECT COUNT(*) C FROM FLC_USER_GROUP_MAPPING where GROUP_ID = 18 AND USER_ID = ?",
        "params" => [$_USER['USERID']]
    ])[0]['C'];
    $staff_id = $unitBayaran>0?null:$_USER['STAFF_ID'];

    $adminpower = $_USER['USERID']==1 || $unitBayaran>0 ?
					"((bmm.createdby IN (SELECT stf_ad_username FROM ".DB2.".staff s, ".DB2.".staff_service ss WHERE s.stf_staff_id = ss.stf_staff_id AND sts_oun_code IN (SELECT sss.sts_oun_code FROM ".DB2.".staff_service sss WHERE sss.stf_staff_id = ?)) OR wtk_staff_id = ?) OR 1 = 1) AND":
					"(bmm.createdby IN (SELECT stf_ad_username FROM ".DB2.".staff s, ".DB2.".staff_service ss WHERE s.stf_staff_id = ss.stf_staff_id AND sts_oun_code IN (SELECT sss.sts_oun_code FROM ".DB2.".staff_service sss WHERE sss.stf_staff_id = ?)) OR wtk_staff_id = ?) AND";

	$param = [
        $_USER['STAFF_ID'],
		$staff_id,
		$_USER['STAFF_ID']
    ];

	if($_POST['search']['value']){
		$sm_filter .= " AND CONCAT_WS('__',
						bmm.bmm_budget_movement_no,
						bmm.bmm_year,
						bmm.qbu_quarter_id,
						format(bmm.bmm_total_amt, 2),
						bmm.bmm_total_amt,
						bmm.bmm_status,
						bmm.bmm_reason,
						bmm.bmm_description,
						bmm.bmm_endorse_doc,
						ifnull(bmm.updateddate,bmm.createddate)
					) LIKE CONCAT('%', ?, '%')
		";
		$param[] = $_POST['search']['value'];
	}

	if($_POST["smartFilter"]['sm_bmm_year']){
		$sm_filter .= " AND bmm_year = ?";
		$param[] = $_POST["smartFilter"]['sm_bmm_year'];
	}

	if($_POST["smartFilter"]['sm_bmm_status']){
		$sm_filter .= " AND bmm_status = ?";
		$param[] = $_POST["smartFilter"]['sm_bmm_status'];
	}

	//============================================================ common filter
	$common = "
	    FROM ".DB2.".budget_movement_master bmm
		LEFT JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT wtk_application_id, wtk_workflow_code, wtk_status, wtk_staff_id FROM ".DB2.".wf_task) wt ON wt.wtk_application_id = bmm.bmm_budget_movement_no AND wt.wtk_workflow_code = 'BUDGET' AND wt.wtk_status = 'NEW' AND wtk_staff_id = ?,
		".DB2.".budget_movement_detl bmd,
		".DB2.".structure_budget sb
	    WHERE
			$adminpower
	        bmm_trans_type = 'INCREMENT'
			AND bmd.sbg_budget_id_to = sb.sbg_budget_id
			AND bmm.bmm_budget_movement_id = bmd.bmm_budget_movement_id
			$sm_filter
	";
	
	//============================================================ record count
	$sql = "SELECT COUNT(bmm_budget_movement_id) C 
			FROM (
			SELECT DISTINCT
				bmm.bmm_budget_movement_id,
				bmm.bmm_budget_movement_no,
				bmm.bmm_year,
				bmm.qbu_quarter_id,
				format(bmm_total_amt, 2) bmm_total_amt,
				bmm.bmm_status,
				bmm.bmm_reason,
				bmm.bmm_description,
				bmm.bmm_endorse_doc,
				ifnull(bmm.updateddate,bmm.createddate) date
			$common) tbl";
	$recordsFiltered = executeQueryV2($sql, $param)[0]['C'];
	
	//============================================================ main sql
	$sql = "
	    SELECT DISTINCT
			bmm.bmm_budget_movement_id,
	        bmm.bmm_budget_movement_no,
	        bmm.bmm_year,
			bmm.qbu_quarter_id,
			format(bmm_total_amt, 2) bmm_total_amt,
			bmm.bmm_status,
			bmm.bmm_reason,
			bmm.bmm_description,
			bmm.bmm_endorse_doc,
			ifnull(bmm.updateddate,bmm.createddate) date
			#(SELECT CONCAT_WS(' - ',sb.oun_code,o.oun_desc) FROM fims_usr.organization_unit o WHERE o.oun_code = sb.oun_code AND bmd.sbg_budget_id_to = sbg_budget_id) oun_code
	    $common
	    ORDER BY RIGHT(bmm_budget_movement_no,4) desc, LEFT(bmm_budget_movement_no,8) desc
	    LIMIT ".$_POST['start'].", ".$_POST['length']."
	";
	$data = executeQueryV2($sql, $param);
	
	for($a=0; $a<count($data);$a++){
		$data[$a]['urlEdit'] = 'index.php?a='.flc_url_encode('page=page_wrapper&menuID=1557&mode=edit&currStatus='.$data[$a]['bmm_status'].'&bmm_budget_movement_id='.$data[$a]['bmm_budget_movement_id']);
		$data[$a]['urlView'] = 'index.php?a='.flc_url_encode('page=page_wrapper&menuID=1557&mode=view&currStatus='.$data[$a]['bmm_status'].'&bmm_budget_movement_id='.$data[$a]['bmm_budget_movement_id']);
	}
	
	//============================================================ finally
	return [
	    'draw' => $_POST['draw'],
	    'recordsFiltered' => $recordsFiltered,
	    'data' => $data
	];
				
}

if($_GET['cancelProcess']){
	$sql = "
		select 
			sbg_budget_id_to, 
			bmd.qbu_quarter_id, 
			now() currdate, 
			qbu_year,
			bmm_budget_movement_no, 
			bmd_mvt_amt, 
			bmd_bgt_movement_detl_id
		from 
			".DB2.".budget_movement_detl bmd, 
			".DB2.".budget_movement_master bmm,
			".DB2.".quarter_budget qb
		where 
			bmm.bmm_budget_movement_id = bmd.bmm_budget_movement_id and
			bmd.qbu_quarter_id = qb.qbu_quarter_id and
			sbg_budget_id_to is not null and
			bmm.bmm_budget_movement_id = ?
	";
	
	$rs = executeQueryV2($sql, [$_GET['bmm_budget_movement_id']]);
	
	for($s=0; $s<count($rs); $s++){
		// nak dptkan bmd_bgt_movement_detl_id utk sp update_budget tambah 250223
		$sql_budgetcode = "SELECT lbc_budget_code FROM ".DB2.".structure_budget WHERE sbg_budget_id = ?";
		$rs_budgetcode = executeQueryV2($sql_budgetcode, [$rs[$s]['sbg_budget_id_to']])[0]['lbc_budget_code'];
		executeQueryV2("CALL ".DB2.".update_budget('{$rs[$s]['sbg_budget_id_to']}', '{$rs[$s]['qbu_quarter_id']}', '{$rs[$s]['currdate']}', '{$rs[$s]['qbu_year']}', '{$rs[$s]['bmm_budget_movement_no']}',  NULL, 'INCREASE', 
			'{$rs_budgetcode}', '-".$rs[$s]['bmd_mvt_amt']."', '1557', '06', @p_msg, 'INCREMENT', '{$rs[$s]['bmd_bgt_movement_detl_id']}', null, null, ?)", [$_USER['USERNAME']]);
		
		$rsMessage = executeQueryV2("SELECT @p_msg as MESSAGE")[0]['MESSAGE'];
	}
	
	$rsUpdateMaster = executeQueryV2("update ".DB2.".budget_movement_master set bmm_status = 'CANCEL', bmm_cancel_remark = ? where bmm_budget_movement_id = ?", [$_POST['bmm_cancel_remark'], $_GET['bmm_budget_movement_id']]);
	
	$rsUpdateDetail = executeQueryV2("update ".DB2.".budget_movement_detl set bmd_mvt_status = 'CANCEL' where bmm_budget_movement_id = ?", [$_GET['bmm_budget_movement_id']]);
	
	if($rsUpdateMaster && $rsUpdateDetail){
		return [
			"status" => "ok"
		];
	}else{
		return [
			"status" => "ko"
		];
	}
}

if($_GET['deleteItem']){
	$rsDeleteDetail = executeQueryV2("delete from ".DB2.".budget_movement_detl where bmm_budget_movement_id = ?", [$_GET['bmm_budget_movement_id']]);
	
	$rsDeleteMaster = executeQueryV2("delete from ".DB2.".budget_movement_master where bmm_budget_movement_id = ?", [$_GET['bmm_budget_movement_id']]);
	
	if($rsDeleteDetail && $rsDeleteDetail){
		return [
			"status" => "ok"
		];
	}else{
		return [
			"status" => "ko"
		];
	}
}

// Continue by Nad on 080323
if($_GET['download']){

	//================================================utk unitPurchasing punya case, gedik
    $unitBayaran = executeQueryV2([

    ])[0]['C'];
    $staff_id = $unitBayaran>0?null:$_USER['STAFF_ID'];

    $adminpower = $_USER['USERID']==1 || $unitBayaran>0 ?
					"((bmm.createdby IN (SELECT stf_ad_username FROM ".DB2.".staff s, ".DB2.".staff_service ss WHERE s.stf_staff_id = ss.stf_staff_id AND sts_oun_code IN (SELECT sss.sts_oun_code FROM ".DB2.".staff_service sss WHERE sss.stf_staff_id = ?)) OR wtk_staff_id = ?) OR 1 = 1) AND":
					"(bmm.createdby IN (SELECT stf_ad_username FROM ".DB2.".staff s, ".DB2.".staff_service ss WHERE s.stf_staff_id = ss.stf_staff_id AND sts_oun_code IN (SELECT sss.sts_oun_code FROM ".DB2.".staff_service sss WHERE sss.stf_staff_id = ?)) OR wtk_staff_id = ?) AND";

	$param = [
        $_USER['STAFF_ID'],
		$staff_id,
		$_USER['STAFF_ID']
    ];

	if($_POST['search']['value']){
		$sm_filter .= " AND CONCAT_WS('__',
						bmm_budget_movement_no,
						bmm_year,
						qbu_quarter_id,
						format(bmm_total_amt, 2),
						bmm_total_amt,
						bmm_status,
						bmm_description,
						bmm_endorse_doc,
						ifnull(bmm.updateddate,bmm.createddate)
					) LIKE CONCAT('%', ?, '%')
		";
		$param[] = $_POST['search']['value'];
	}

	if($_POST["sm_filter"]['sm_bmm_year']){
		$sm_filter .= " AND bmm_year = ?";
		$param[] = $_POST["sm_filter"]['sm_bmm_year'];
	}

	if($_POST["sm_filter"]['sm_bmm_status']){
		$sm_filter .= " AND bmm_status = ?";
		$param[] = $_POST["sm_filter"]['sm_bmm_status'];
	}

	//============================================================ common filter
	$common = " FROM ".DB2.".budget_movement_master bmm
				LEFT JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT wtk_application_id, wtk_workflow_code, wtk_status, wtk_staff_id FROM ".DB2.".wf_task) wt ON wt.wtk_application_id = bmm.bmm_budget_movement_no AND wt.wtk_workflow_code = 'BUDGET' AND wt.wtk_status = 'NEW' AND wtk_staff_id = ?
				WHERE
					$adminpower
					bmm_trans_type = 'INCREMENT'
					$sm_filter
	";

	$column = $_POST['sort']['column'];
	$column = $column+1;

	//============================================================ CSV & PDF
	if($_GET['download']=='CSV'){

		$desc = (PROJECT_TYPE == 'maips') ? '`Description`' : '`Authority Approval`';

		$sql = "SELECT DISTINCT
					1 Indexing,
					bmm_year `Year`,
					bmm_budget_movement_no `Reference No`,
					bmm_endorse_doc $desc,
					bmm_description `Remark/Reason`,
					format(bmm_total_amt, 2) `Amount`,
					bmm_status `Status`,
					DATE_FORMAT(ifnull(bmm.updateddate,bmm.createddate),'%d/%m/%Y') `Date`,
					bmm_budget_movement_id
				$common
				ORDER BY RIGHT(bmm_budget_movement_no,4) desc, LEFT(bmm_budget_movement_no,8) desc
		";
		$data = executeQueryV2($sql, $param);

		foreach($data as &$d) {
			unset($d['Indexing'], $d['bmm_budget_movement_id']);
		}
		
		//============================================================ finally
		generateCSV([
			"filename" => "List of Budget Increment", 
			"header" => [
				[' ',' ','List of Budget Increment'],
				['Tarikh:', '' ,date("Y/m/d")],
				['Search ', ':', $_POST['search']['value']],
			],
			"index" => true,
			"content" => $data,
		]);
	}
	elseif($_GET['download']=='PDF'){

		$desc = (PROJECT_TYPE == 'maips') ? '`Description`' : '`Authority Approval`';
		

		$sql = "
			SELECT DISTINCT
				1 `FORMAT_CENTER::Indexing`,
				bmm_year `FORMAT_CENTER::Year`,
				bmm_budget_movement_no `FORMAT_CENTER::Reference No`,
				bmm_endorse_doc $desc,
				bmm_description `Remark/Reason`,
				format(bmm_total_amt, 2) `FORMAT_RIGHT::Amount`,
				bmm_status `FORMAT_CENTER::Status`,
				DATE_FORMAT(ifnull(bmm.updateddate,bmm.createddate),'%d/%m/%Y') `FORMAT_CENTER::Date`,
				bmm_budget_movement_id
			$common
			ORDER BY RIGHT(bmm_budget_movement_no,4) desc, LEFT(bmm_budget_movement_no,8) desc
		";

		$data = executeQueryV2(["sql" => $sql, 
			"params" => $param
		]);

		foreach($data as &$d) {
			unset($d['bmm_budget_movement_id']);
		}
		$topmargin = (PROJECT_TYPE == 'maips') ? 38.6 : 31.5;
		generatePDF([
			"filename" => "List of Budget Increment",
			"DATA" => $data,
			"columnwidth" => [7,6,12,18,27,10,10,10],
			"orientation" => 'lanscape',
			"fontsize" => 8,
			"topmargin" => $topmargin,
		]);
	}
}
